dashboard.failedToGenerateSummary: Failed to generate summary. Please try again.
dashboard.exampleGoalPreview: This is what your goals will look like. Start tracking your progress now.
dashboard.aiInsightPreview: Connect your GitHub account to unlock AI-generated contribution narratives that synthesize your commits, PRs, and code reviews into compelling summaries.

features.smartGoalsDesc: Set Specific, Measurable, Achievable, Relevant, and Time-bound goals with key results tracking.
features.feedback360Desc: Request anonymous peer reviews using the COIN framework (Context, Observation, Impact, Next Steps).
features.aiSummariesDesc: Auto-generate contribution narratives from your GitHub commits, PRs, and code reviews.

goals.title: My Goals
goals.description: Track your SMART goals and key results
goals.deleteConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this goal? This action cannot be undone.
goals.noGoalsDescription: Set goals to track progress and align team objectives with company priorities.
goals.noMatchingGoalsDescription: Try adjusting your filters or search query.

form.title: Create SMART Goal
form.subtitle: Define specific, measurable objectives with key results
form.goalTitlePlaceholder: e.g., Improve API response times by 50%
form.privateGoal: Private goal (only visible to you and manager)
form.disabledTooltip: Fill in goal title and target date to create

smart.title: SMART Framework
smart.subtitle: Break down your goal using the SMART framework for better clarity and tracking.
smart.specific: Specific - What exactly do you want to achieve?
smart.specificPlaceholder: e.g., Reduce average API response time from 800ms to 400ms for the /users endpoint
smart.measurable: Measurable - How will you measure progress?
smart.measurablePlaceholder: e.g., Track p95 response times in monitoring dashboard, aim for 50% reduction
smart.achievable: Achievable - Is this realistic with available resources?
smart.achievablePlaceholder: e.g., Yes, based on profiling we identified N+1 queries that can be optimized
smart.relevantPlaceholder: e.g., Improves user experience and reduces server costs by 20%

keyResults.title: Key Results (OKRs)
keyResults.subtitle: Define measurable outcomes that indicate goal completion

autoLink.title: Auto-Link GitHub Activity
autoLink.subtitle: Commits and PRs containing these keywords will be automatically linked to this goal.
autoLink.keywordsTip: Tip: Use project codes, feature names, or issue numbers for better matching

cycles.title: Review Cycles
cycles.description: Manage performance review cycles for your workspace
cycles.noCyclesDescription: Create your first review cycle to start collecting 360° feedback from your team.

form.title: Create Review Cycle
form.subtitle: Set up a new performance review cycle for your team
form.disabledTooltip: Fill in cycle name, start date, and end date to create
form.dateError: End date must be after start date

deadlines.title: Phase Deadlines
deadlines.subtitle: Set deadlines for each review phase. Leave blank for no deadline.

settings.title: Review Settings
settings.peerSelectionHelp: "Both" allows employees to request reviewers and managers to assign additional ones.
settings.includeGitHubDesc: Auto-import commits, PRs, and code reviews from the review period

phases.selfReviewDesc: Team members reflect on their achievements and areas for growth using structured prompts.
phases.peerReviewDesc: Collect anonymous 360° feedback from colleagues using the COIN framework.
phases.managerReviewDesc: Managers synthesize feedback and provide final ratings and development recommendations.

peerRequests.title: Peer Review Requests
peerRequests.noPeerRequestsDescription: When colleagues request your feedback for their performance review, they'll appear here.
peerRequests.aboutDescription: Peer reviews use the COIN framework for structured, constructive feedback:

manage.title: Review Management
manage.description: Monitor team reviews, track deliverables, and manage goals
manage.allCaughtUpDesc: No pending actions at the moment. Check back later or view team overview.
manage.noSuggestionsDesc: Goal suggestions will appear here as we analyze GitHub activity and project management data from your team.
manage.aiSuggestionsDesc: Based on GitHub activity, PR patterns, and project management data. Convert to goals or discard.
